gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/100)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/100)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِذَا طَافَتِ الْمَرْأَةُ الْحَائِضُ ثُمَّ أَرَادَتْ أَنْ تُوَدِّعَ الْبَيْتَ فَلْتَقِفْ عَلَى أَدْنَى بَابٍ مِنْ أَبْوَابِ الْمَسْجِدِ وَ لْتُوَدِّعِ الْبَيْتَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Salma Bin Al Khattab, from Ali Bin Al Husayn, from Muhammad Bin Ziyad, from Hammad, from a man who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullahasws saying: ‘When the menstruating woman performs Tawaaf, then she intends to bid farewell to the House (Kabah), so let her stand upon the nearest door from the doors of the Masjid, and let her bid farewell to the House (Kabah)’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Salmah ibn al-Khattab from Ali ibn al-Husayn from Muhammad ibn Ziyad from Hammad from a man who has said the following: “I once heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, say, ‘A woman experiencing Hayd (menses) who has performed Tawaf then wants to say farewell to the House, should stand near any of the doors of the Masjid and say farewell to the House.’”
